URI.MungeResources TYPE: bool VERSION: 3.1.1 DEFAULT: false --DESCRIPTION-- <p> If true, any URI munging directives like %URI.Munge will also apply to embedded resources, such as <code>&lt;img src=""&gt;</code>. Be careful enabling this directive if you have a redirector script that does not use the <code>Location</code> HTTP header; all of your images and other embedded resources will break. </p> <p> <strong>Warning:</strong> It is strongly advised you use this in conjunction %URI.MungeSecretKey to mitigate the security risk of an open redirector. </p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
